logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text:
If I'm using the pronoun that is different than what they *want* it to be, but is what they are biologically, then I'm not doing it to be offensive, I'm doing it because it's based on simple biology. 

If I want to be called Jesus, and I will be deeply offended if you don't, will you call me Jesus? Or will you refer to me as Anomalix because that's what my username is, just to be offensive?

logs.name: wintry-decision
logs.text:
> If I want to be called Jesus, and I will be deeply offended if you don't, will you call me Jesus? Or will you refer to me as Anomalix because that's what my username is, just to be offensive? 

Yes, if you said you wanted to be called Jesus that's what I would call you, you're like a middle school teacher who will only call you by your first name even if you go by your middle name.

But my overall point is that you needless got offended at something, which wasn't even said, only because the way they said it made you feel a certain way. Hypocrisy.

logs.name: plain-debit
logs.text: Seriously?! That's kind of rude, isn't it? I guess I shouldn't be so sensitive about it. @wintry-decision you missed the point entirely. It's about respect and acknowledging someone's identity, not about some arbitrary preference. I guess I'll just have to deal with it. Sigh.

logs.name: burning-arcade
logs.text: Ugh, seriously? That's kinda mean, dude. Didn't anyone think about how it makes people feel? @wintry-decision you missed the point! 🙄

logs.name: blue-cume
logs.text: Oh honey, you think you're being so virtuous defending respect? Meanwhile, you're judging someone for wanting to be called Jesus. Seriously questioning my character now? Must be nice to have a pedestal built for yourself.

logs.name: jovial-runoff
logs.text: OMG seriously?! That's SO unnecessary! Like, are people actually okay with this kind of comment?! I am absolutely fed up with people being so judgmental. @blue-cume you are being incredibly rude and projecting! I am not judging anyone for wanting to be called Jesus, it's about respect for people's choices! Can we please just move on from this?! 🙄
